description: Validators on a derived (const) cell are REJECTED (§55.14). const <doubled req min(0)> = @count * 2 carries validators on a read-only computed value → E-DERIVED-WITH-VALIDATORS (one error listing all offending validators).
rationale: §55.14: derived cells are READ-ONLY; validators imply gating which is incoherent on a computed value. The compiler emits E-DERIVED-WITH-VALIDATORS at the A1b resolve-type stage (after shape-discrimination sets decl.isConst). Codes-only reject-path case.
